results.decl: theorem p04 (a b : Nat) : a + b = b + a
results.proof:
theorem p04 (a b : Nat) : a + b = b + a := by
        intro b
        induction b with
        | zero => rfl
        | succ m ih => rw [show (succ m) + 0 = succ (m + 0) from rfl, ih]; rfl
      rw [show 0 + b = b from rfl, lem b]; rfl
  | succ n ih =>
      have add_succ : ∀ b, b + (succ n) = succ (b + n) := by
        intro b
        induction b with
        | zero => rw [show 0 + (succ n) = succ n from rfl, show 0 + n = n from rfl]; rfl
        | succ m ih_inner => rw [show (succ m) + (succ n) = succ (m + (succ n)) from rfl, ih_inner]; rfl
      rw [show (succ n) + b = succ (n + b) from rfl, ih, add_succ]; rfl

results.proof: theorem p07 (n : Nat) : n ≤ n := Nat.le.refl n
theorem p08 (n : Nat) : 0 < n + 1 := by induction n with | zero => exact Nat.le_refl | succ k ih => exact Nat.le_step ih

results.decl: theorem p10 (l : List Nat) : l ++ [] = l
results.proof:
theorem p10 (l : List Nat) : l ++ [] = l := by
  induction l with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons a as ih =>
    rw [List.concat_eq_append, ih]

results.decl: theorem p11 (a b c : Nat) : a * (b + c) = a * b + a * c
results.proof:
theorem p11 (a b c : Nat) : a * (b + c) = a * b + a * c := by
  induction a with
  | zero => 
      rw [Nat.zero_mul, Nat.zero_mul, Nat.zero_mul]
      rfl
  | succ n ih =>
      rw [Nat.succ_mul, Nat.succ_mul, Nat.succ_mul, ih]
      rw [Nat.add_assoc]
      rw [Nat.add_left_comm c (n * b) (n * c)]
      rw [← Nat.add_assoc]

results.proof: theorem p12 (p q : Prop) (h : p ∨ q) : q ∨ p := match h with | Or.inl hp => Or.inr hp | Or.inr hq => Or.inl hq
